title: Liquorice Shaders
description: 一个量级着色器包供Iris使用。A lightweight shaderpack for Iris.
body:
> Hey! 这个着色器包需要[Iris](https://www.irisshaders.dev/)。This shader pack requires [Iris](https://www.irisshaders.dev/) to run.



## ABOUT
Liquorice is a Minecraft shader pack for Iris. It’s been designed with the intention of being exceptionally lightweight, while still providing supplementary graphics options.
 In the list below, you can review the various feature the Liquorice shaders has to offer.
### Features
|  |  |
| - | - |
|Ambient Occlusion | 环境光遮蔽
|Bloom | 高光
|Specular Highlighting | 镜面高光
|Approximated Water Caustics | 近似下水光焦散
|Color Corrections | 色彩校正

Most settings can be toggled from the settings menu if you believe they are impacting performance. 

## TO-DO
I do have future plans for the Liquorice Shaders. As a note for myself and others, they are as follows:
- Add Optifine support.
- Add a boat-water texture mask.
